name: Rigetti Computing, Inc.
description: Rigetti Computing, Inc. is a pioneer in full-stack quantum computing, specializing in the development of superconducting quantum integrated circuits. Based in Berkeley, California, the company builds quantum computers and the superconducting quantum processors that power them. Through its cloud platform, Quantum Cloud Services (QCS), Rigetti enables researchers and developers to access its quantum hardware to execute complex algorithms. By integrating hardware design, fabrication, and software development, the company aims to solve humanity's most pressing computational challenges, positioning itself as a key player in the advancement of practical, scalable quantum computing technology.
